paper.title_en: An analytic model for a total process of gravitational collapse: From star to Schwarzschild black hole
paper.abstract_en: We present an exact analytical model describing a complete gravitational collapse of matter from horizonless initial conditions to black hole formation, tracing the full evolution of the horizon $H(t)$ from its formation at microscopic scales to macroscopic stabilization. The solution reveals two main stages: (i) a dynamical horizon growth, where an apparent horizon $H(t)$ emerges at a critical time $t_b$ until reaching its final size $h=2 M$, demonstrating how trapped surfaces form dynamically in finite time, and (ii) a {naked-}singularity resolution, where an integrable Ricci curvature singularity ($R^μ_ν\sim r^{-2}$) develops at $r=0$, but remains causally hidden by the horizon growth, preserving weak cosmic censorship without exotic matter. The model could offer a framework to study the quantum-to-classical transition ($H(t) \sim \ell_{\rm Planck}$).

decision.selection_reason_zh: 模型提供了引力坍缩全过程的精确解析解，涵盖动态地平线形成和裸奇点消解，对广义相对论基础有重要意义。
decision.title_zh: 引力坍缩全过程的解析模型：从恒星到史瓦西黑洞
decision.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个精确的解析模型，描述了物质从无地平线初始条件到黑洞形成的完整引力坍缩过程，追踪了地平线 H(t) 从微观尺度形成到宏观稳定的完整演化。该解揭示了两个主要阶段：(i) 动态地平线增长，其中表观地平线 H(t) 在临界时间 t_b 出现，直到达到其最终大小 h=2M，展示了陷获面如何在有限时间内动态形成；(ii) 裸奇点消解，其中可积的里奇曲率奇点 (R^μ_ν∼r^{-2}) 在 r=0 处发展，但被地平线增长因果地隐藏，无需奇异物质即可保护弱宇宙监督假设。该模型可为研究量子到经典过渡 (H(t)∼ℓ_Planck) 提供框架。
